$uid..write: auth != null && auth.uid === $uid && ( !data.exists() ? newData.child('paymentStatus').val() === 'pending' : newData.child('paymentStatus').val() === data.child('paymentStatus').val() )

$shopSlug..write: auth != null && ( (!data.exists() && newData.child('ownerUid').val() === auth.uid) || (data.exists() && data.child('ownerUid').val() === auth.uid) )
